specific_question: In Q3 2024,  what was the age distribution of patients who contacted MediConn Solutions' customer service?
answer: In Q3 2024, according to MediConn Solutions' IT department data, 28% of customer service contacts were from patients aged 25-34, 35% from ages 35-49, 22% from ages 50-64, and 15% from ages 65+.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
